spec_match.rationale: Simulates CSP + Speculation-Rules header with pre/post-131 verdicts — exactly the chromestatus surface.

interactive.rationale: Editable CSP + header URL drives a side-by-side outcome panel.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises CSP + speculation rules simulator with before/after — page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Simulator is in-page only; doesn't actually issue the fetch with the Speculation-Rules header to verify real Chrome behaviour against the chosen CSP. Pure simulation.

openQuestions.title: Wire a real server route for the header
openQuestions.detail: Add a server-side route under this concept folder (`echo` or `headers`) that returns the chosen Speculation-Rules header with the chosen CSP. The page can then fetch from it and verify Chrome's real behaviour instead of simulating.

summary: Working CSP/speculation-rules simulator with side-by-side verdicts. Would land better with a real server route that issues the header so the verdict is observed rather than simulated.
